stories.headline: ‘Ridiculous’ for US to maintain current Nato support, Trump warns ahead of alliance summit

stories.headline: Newsletter: ‘Raging’ Trump turns up the heat ahead of NATO summit

stories.headline: Odd Lots: How Aldi Strategizes to Lower Grocery Costs (Podcast)
stories.summary: In June, grocery giant Aldi opened a store just off of Times Square in Manhattan. It’s the company’s first location in Midtown and, according to their US Chief Commercial Officer Scott Patton, Aldi has to orchestrate a “logistical symphony” to get groceries into the middle of one of the busiest places in America. For instance, they use shorter trucks to navigate the tight corners of New York City streets. On this episode, we speak with Patton abo

stories.headline: Total Offers Iraqi Oil to Asian Refiners as Supply Swells
stories.summary: French oil major TotalEnergies SE is offering millions of barrels of Iraqi crude that can be promptly delivered to Asia, according to traders, adding to a market already brimming with supply.

stories.headline: Yen Isn't Behaving Like a G10 Currency, Mizuho Says
stories.summary: Jordan Rochester, Mizuho FICC strategy EMEA head, discusses sharp moves in the yen. "From all the frameworks, dollar-yen should be lower," he tells Bloomberg Television. He adds there has been a change in behaviors in the Japanese space and the yen is not behaving like a G10 currency. "It trades like an EM in terms of its correlation to rates," Rochester says.  (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Qatar LNG Ship Traffic Through Hormuz Resumes After Brief Pause

stories.headline: Can China target critics abroad with its new 'ethnic unity' law?
